get.summary: Returns OASys sections to support an Application.  The Supporting Information sections are returned if linked to harm and optionally if their section number appears in the selected-sections query parameter. CAS1 should use /cas1/people/CRN/oasys/answers. CAS3 shoudl use /cas3/people/CRN/oasys/riskManagement

get.summary: Returns a list of users. If only the user's ID and Name are required, use /users/summary. Deprecated, use /cas1/users
Returns a user with match on name. Deprecated, use /cas1/users/delius
Returns a list of users with partial match on name. Deprecated, use /cas1/users/search
Returns a list of user summaries (i.e. id and name only). Deprecated, use /cas1/users/summary

offenceDescription.example: Wounding or inflicting grievous bodily harm (inflicting bodily injury with or without weapon) (S20) - 00801

cruManagementArea.description: CRU Management Area to use. This will be the same as cruManagementAreaDefault unless cruManagementAreaOverride is defined

cruManagementAreaDefault.description: The CRU Management Area used if no override is defined. This is provided to support the user configuration page.

attachmentNumber.description: The number of the attachment which will match any corresponding reference in the content section

contentType.description: The content type of the attachment

filesize.description: The size of the attachment file in bytes

headers.description: The additional headers to use when calling the url for fetching this attachment

name.description: The name or description of the attachment which will be included in the report

url.description: The url to be used to download the attachment file

bedEndDate.description: End date of the bed availability, open for availability if not specified

cancellations.description: The full history of the cancellation

departures.description: The full history of the departure

durationDays.description: The number of days the Bed will need to be free from the start_date until

probationDeliveryUnits.description: The list of pdus Ids to search within

cancellations.description: The full history of the cancellation

departures.description: The full history of the departure

startDate.description: Start date of the bedspace availability.

characteristics.description: Will be replaced with Cas3PremisesCharacteristics for v2

attachments.description: The details of any attachments for the subject access request response

content.description: The content of the subject access request response

name.example: Double Room with Single Occupancy - Other (Non-FM)

NewBookingNotMade.description: Details about the failure to match

assessmentId.description: The ID of assessment being used. This should always be the latest Layer 3 assessment, regardless of state.

placementDates.description: Placement apps only have one set of placement dates, use 'dates' instead

directoryName.description: Directory within the pre-configured seed directory

fileName.description: File within the pre-configured seed directory

dueDate.description: The Due date of the task - this is deprecated in favour of the `dueAt` field

personName.description: Superseded by personSummary which provides 'name' as well as 'personType' and 'crn'.

users.description: Users to whom this task can be allocated

UpdatePremises.description: Information to update the premises with
